Feel Our Heartbeat!
Design Your Own PowerPack
Better Control and Efficiency Than Ever Before
Energy-Efficient and Future-Proofed
Mobile Electric Drive Technology for Electromobility
Ergonomic and Height-Adjustable Workbenches
Step Into the World of Hydraulics
A big welcome to our world of hydraulics.
Hydraulics is the study of the flow behavior of fluids when used for transmitting signals, forces, and power. For us, this means that we are always working with the pressure of the oil flow. Not only from a physical perspective, but also in terms of new ideas and adapting to the wishes of our customers. We direct our ideas towards the needs of the market.
About us - Welcome to Bucher Hydraulics!
Job and Career Opportunities at Bucher Hydraulics
At Bucher Hydraulics, we live a culture that promotes open communication, personal development, and intensive teamwork across the board. This expertise is only one part of our success, however. The above-average commitment, the high levels of dedication and the initiative of our people form an immense potential on which to draw.
Locations and Job Opportunities

products.text:
Products
MOBILE product platform
For electrical units in commercial vehicles
Based on its many years of experience, Bucher Hydraulics Mobile Drives has developed the compact MOBILE product platform with multi-inverters and DC/DC converters – for successful application in your vehicles.
When looking for the right products to suit your requirements, you have the option of choosing an electric modular drive system for applications in commercial vehicles.
Catalogue-based modular drive systems
You can find the right product type for your application with ease thanks to the catalogue-based approach. In addition, the scalability covers a wide power range with identical external dimensions.
The principle is quite simple: catalogue-based modular drive systems.
Vehicle manufacturers and parts suppliers can configure and create the best possible drive solution tailored to the respective task – quickly and without any irritating complications.
Working with our customers, we always select the appropriate solution for your application. This is then easily integrated into the vehicle thanks to a consistent and uniform concept for the connections.
Applications
Control of electric drives for auxiliary units such as:
Air conditioning compressor
Power steering pump
Air Compressors
Provision of the on-board power supply 12/24 VDC
Active front end control for socket function and onboard charger
Positioning tasks in a harsh environment, e.g. lifting device of a waste truck
Highlights
Designed as a catalogue-based modular electrical automotive drive system
Wide variety of versions available in just one design
The calalogue-based modular system is suitable for both mass production and customised solutions
Designed specifically for rugged applications in commercial vehicles
City buses
Trucks
Agricultural vehicles (tractors, trailers, etc.)
Construction vehicles
Your benefits
Ready-to-use modular system
Choose the models and outputs to suit your requirements
Different versions available from series production
Excellent volume/performance ratio
Designed specifically for applications in commercial vehicles
Service life and cycle resistance designed specifically for rugged applications in commercial vehicles, especially for city buses
Robust and compact housing
Basic housing concept for easy integration of devices of different performance classes
Makes your vehicle very energy-efficient
Easy integration into your system
Each model variant comes with the same external dimensions and interfaces
Extremely easy to integrate into the vehicle system via a standard communication bus
Easy for the user to commission
Plug connectors
Short product launch times
Minimal development effort
Low process complexity due to tried-and-tested series-produced components
